questions.question: Explain the basic steps of the Decrease-and-Conquer approach used in the Insertion Sort algorithm. Provide an example to illustrate this.
questions.hint: Focus on the key insights of the algorithm

questions.question: Compare the time complexity of Insertion Sort with other popular sorting algorithms like Bubble Sort and Selection Sort. Which algorithm is more efficient in scenarios where the input size is large?
questions.hint: Use Big O notation to support your answer

questions.question: A list of 5 elements is initially sorted in ascending order: [3, 1, 2, 4, 6]. Using the Decrease-and-Conquer approach, describe the steps to sort this list using Insertion Sort.
questions.hint: Focus on the iterative process of Insertion Sort
